params.expected_text: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단

etap_response.body: {"type":"success","completion":"⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다."}

goaway_false_effect.improvement: No more ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED cascade — GOAWAY=false fix works

diagnosis.content_type_fix: VERIFIED — Response Content-Type is now application/x-ndjson (was application/json in #159)
diagnosis.goaway_fix: VERIFIED — No ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED errors (3 in #159 → 0 in #160)
diagnosis.root_cause: NDJSON body format mismatch: Etap returns single JSON object but Notion client expects NDJSON streaming events. runInferenceTranscriptApiError indicates the JS parser fails to process the response body even though Content-Type is correct.
diagnosis.body_format_issue: Etap sends: {"type":"success","completion":"..."} — Notion likely expects chunked NDJSON lines like: {"type":"delta","text":"..."} per line
diagnosis.secondary_issue: markInferenceTranscriptSeen returns 404 — transcript record may not be created because response parsing failed

recommendation: Fix NDJSON body format to match Notion streaming protocol. Capture real Notion AI NDJSON response to reverse-engineer exact event format.
